overview.name: Auth JWT Manual
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow manually without using auth command.
Test flow includes: 1. Reset JWT auth state before test. 2. Send POST login request with valid credentials. 3. Verify login response = 200. 4. Extract access token from response. 5. Send GET request with Authorization: Bearer accessToken. 6. Verify protected response = 200. 7. Validate protected response body. 8. Send GET request without token. 9. Verify unauthorized response = 401. 10. Reset JWT auth state after test.
This scenario validates: - Manual JWT login flow - Token extraction via var - Bearer token usage in headers - Protected endpoint access - Unauthorized access without token

http.comment: Login and get JWT access token

var.comment: Extract JWT access token from login response
var.name: token

http.comment: Access protected resource with valid JWT token
Access protected resource without token should fail
Reset JWT auth state after test
